form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up gave a sight but was run down late 2nd of 10 at Busan on January 11 over 1200m, neck behind Winner Clear carrying 52.5kg at $13. Second-up 4th of 12 at Busan on March 8 over 1200m, 2.75 len behind Vincero Cavallo with 55kg at $10. Speedy type drawn the inside and will be in this for a long way.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Carried inward bumped shortly after the start.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 36-day let-up. Last start 2nd of 11 at this track on March 7 over 1200m, 0.5 len behind Hansen Bracing carrying 58kg at $5.30. The start before that 6th of 11 at this track on January 31 over 1400m, 11 len behind Oneuldo Smile with 58kg at $8.70. Chances enhanced by drawing a nice marble.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: From the outside stall, veered out and lost ground at the start.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of seven months. Finished off last preparation sixth of 9 at this track August 31 over 1200m, 8 len behind Wow Wow with 58.5kg at $46.50. First up last campaign ninth of 11 at this track July 27 over 1200m, 15 len behind Black Musk carrying 55kg at $62.20. Others are preferred.

The race before that won by 0.8 len at this track January 17 over 1200m defeating Captain P.K. With 55kg at $4.60. Chances enhanced by drawing a nice marble.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted in and bumped at start.

form.formComment: Second-up today. Last run sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 11 at Busan on March 22 over 1400m, 7 len behind Star Matta with 54.5kg at $5.30. At only start last preparation 5th of 10 at Busan on January 11 over 1200m, 6 len behind Winner Clear carrying 52.5kg at $20.70. Must improve significantly.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the 1600m, had to steady when Doctor Caesar shifted in.
Crowded by Doctor Caesar passing the 1000m.

form.formComment: Returns from a 35-day let-up. Most recently made ground from midfield; 3rd of 11 at this track on March 8 over 1200m, slow going 4.5 len behind Magic Potion with 52.5kg at $9. The run before that 3rd of 11 at this track on February 8 over 1200m, 3 len behind Wow Wow carrying 52.5kg at $15.20. Will not find this easy. Not keen.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid out shortly after the start, causing Cardinal Force to shift in.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. First-up gave a sight but was run down late 2nd of 15 at this track in LR on February 15 over 1200m, 1.0 len behind Speed Young carrying 57kg at $3.90. Second-up crossed from a wide gate to settle just off the pace but gave ground when 5th of 12 at Busan on March 8 over 1200m, 4 len behind Vincero Cavallo with 57kg at $5.30. Genuine contender under these conditions.

formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). Third-up today and won third-up previously. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped with a runner at the 150m.
Bumped and crowded outwards at start, losing ground.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Comes here off a 35-day let-up. Last start won by 1.5 len at this track March 8 over 1200m on a soft track defeating Best Race carrying 53.5kg at $4. The race before that 4th of 11 at this track on February 8 over 1200m, 4 len behind Wow Wow carrying 52.5kg at $3.10. Exciting galloper with a great record course and distance. Big chance to make it back-to-back successes.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). Racing well recently. Comes here off a 35-day let-up. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lost ground at start when bumped from inside.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Returns from a 35-day let-up. At the latest run made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 12 at Busan on March 8 over 1200m, 2 len behind Vincero Cavallo carrying 57kg at $2.90. The race before that favourite; won by a neck at Busan January 11 over 1200m defeating Born Dia carrying 52.5kg at $1.70. Top Busan galloper having first start this circuit. Stakes winner three back. Should prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). Recent form sound. Returns from a 35-day let-up. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped on jumped. In the homestraight, laid in and was difficult to manage.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months won by 2 len at Busan March 8 over 1200m defeating Winner Clear carrying 57kg at $4.80. Previously second-up 10th of 16 at Busan on October 26 over 1400m, 13 len behind Munhak Boy with 57kg at $6.50. Too good fresh at Busan and has a top record this course and distance. Sure to run well.

The run before that ran last of 11 at this track on January 18 over 1400m, 18 len behind Ziggurat carrying 52.5kg at $11.50. Has the ability to take this out.
